h1: The Guide to Finding Your Perfect Electric Fireplace
h2: 3 Electric Fireplace Installs from Cait Pappas - Designer with Nest Out West
Can an Electric Fireplace Warm a Room?

paragraphs: In today's era of modern living, the allure of a crackling fire need not be reserved for those with traditional wood-burning hearths. With advancements in technology, electric fireplaces offer a compelling alternative, providing both ambiance and warmth without the hassle of maintenance or the need for venting. From sleek built-ins to versatile inserts, the array of electric fireplace types available is as diverse as the preferences of homeowners seeking to elevate their living spaces. Let's delve into the realm of electric fireplaces, exploring their various types and the unique features they bring to the table.

The Inception with Digital Spark™ technology brings a genuine fireside atmosphere. Install it into a wall or choose our Wescott mantel kit. Enjoy year-round with or without heat. Control your fireplace with IntelliFire App, Smart Speaker, or remote control. Add easily to any room with the Wescott Mantel kit; no construction needed.

The SimpliFire Forum outdoor electric fireplace is the easiest way to turn a patio or deck into a go-to oasis. Designed for all seasons and a built-in with flexibility to place it anywhere, the Forum expands your livable area free of propane tanks, gas lines or wood.

Experience luxury living in our sleekest built-in fireplace design. The Scion modern electric fireplace brings finishing materials up to the edge, while clear crystals driftwood logs, LED flames, and ember colors reflect you.

Make your home a unique reflection of you with a dazzling upscale linear electric fireplace. The Allusion Platinum modern electric fireplace is the perfect statement piece for your home. From a large viewing area with minimal frame, personalize your ember bed material, flame, and color lighting themes. Provides a clean look that is fully recessed on a finished 2 x 6 wall; is removable for easy relocating.

We treasure the ambiance of a traditional fireplace, but wood fireplaces aren’t always practical. Our Built-In Electric Fireplace makes it easy to enjoy with dancing LED flames, authentic logs, and warmth from your fireplace when you want it. Learn more about our stylish, modern built-in electric fireplaces. Bring finishing materials up to the edge in a clean look with no visible heat vents or mesh screen.

With its floating mantel, the SimpliFire Format wall-mount electric fireplace is big on atmosphere but low on hassle with the ability to hang it on a wall. Facilitates fast and easy installation with a simple wall mount kit for easy placement.

It's never been more affordable to transform your drafty, dated fireplace into an efficient source of warmth with an Electric Insert. You can also add a new, captivating fireplace in any room to enjoy year-round with or without heat. Install into a wood fireplace opening with a surround kit or any framed opening with the self-trimming design.An electric fireplace can be a captivating addition to your home, providing both warmth and ambiance without the hassle of traditional fireplaces. By considering the factors mentioned above, you'll be well-equipped to choose the perfect electric fireplace for your needs and preferences, request a consult now to get started.

The Format is the best electric fireplace for sleek, minimal style that requires zero hassle to hang. With its floating mantel, this white electric fireplace provides glow from LED flames, as well as moody mantel downlighting. Enjoy it year-round with or without heat. Available in 43-inch, 50-inch, and 60-inch fireplace widths.

Adding the traditional look of a fireplace to your home has never been easier thanks to the Built-in electric fireplace from SimpliFire. A masonry-style interior, textured log set, and flame height adjustments give you all the ambiance of a real fire with the convenience of pressing a button. Available in 30-inch and 36-inch fireplace widths.

The SimpliFire Forum outdoor electric fireplace expands your livable space. Designed to withstand long sun-exposure and weather the elements, the Forum frees up your outdoor area of propane tanks, gas lines and wood. Enjoy the flexibility and ambiance of placing this heat-free fire feature on any deck or patio. Available in 43-inch and 55-inch fireplace widths.

With the modern design of the Allusion Platinum, you can easily create a cozy atmosphere with an optional build-out kit or wall-mount kit, or enjoy a built-in, flush design installed by pros. Use this electric fireplace year-round, with or without heat. Available in 50-inch, 60-inch, and 72-inch fireplace widths.

Enjoy total personalization of your electric fireplace. Choose from multiple fire backdrops with DigitalSpark™ technology, enhanced by a range of built-in sound effects. Plus, enjoy the flexibility of installing the Inception almost anywhere, either directly into the wall or with the Wescott mantel kit. Available in a 36-inch fireplace width.

Convert a drafty, dated fireplace into an eco-friendly, efficient source of warmth with an electric fireplace insert. The electric insert fits directly into a wood fireplace opening with a surround kit or any framed opening with the self-trimming design. Available in 25-inch, 30-inch and 35-inch insert widths.
Discover the world of interior design and home transformation with Cait Pappas at Nest Out West. Get inspired by her DIY projects, Heat & Glo fireplaces, and modern living space designs.
Electric fireplaces offer more than just a cozy glow! Discover their true heating capabilities.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
